what_stands_out: The stark contrast between praise for firm-wide benefits and criticism of the grueling nature of the busy season.
The recurring mention of social events and networking as a positive aspect of the intern and early-career experience.
The tension between the desire for flexible work arrangements and the reality of high-pressure client demands.
The presence of both highly supportive team cultures and pockets of reported toxicity or favoritism.
